.clickable-icon.background: rgb(58, 58, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.box-shadow: rgb(10, 10, 10) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(102, 102, 102) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(51, 51, 51) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(85, 85, 85) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.background: rgb(58, 58, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.box-shadow: rgb(10, 10, 10) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(102, 102, 102) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(51, 51, 51) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(85, 85, 85) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.metadata-container.background: rgb(58, 58, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(68, 68, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.box-shadow: rgb(58, 58, 58) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(136, 136, 136) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(85, 85, 85) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(102, 102, 102) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(45, 45, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
div.workspace-leaf.box-shadow: rgb(58, 58, 58) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(136, 136, 136) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(85, 85, 85) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(102, 102, 102) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

mark.background: rgb(90, 72, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(42, 42, 42) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(42, 42, 42) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
